---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for GitGenius
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What is the current pain point?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Example Usage
How would you use this feature? Provide specific examples:

```bash
# Example command usage
gitgenius new-feature --option value
```

## 🎨 Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Benefits
Who would benefit from this feature and how?
- [ ] Individual developers
- [ ] Teams
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] Open source projects

## 🎚️ Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Can't work without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🔧 Implementation Ideas
If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here.

## 📎 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with GitGenius's goals
- [ ] I have provided clear use cases
